heroTitle: Become a Partner, Share the Divine & Earn
heroDesc: Help others connect with authenticated spiritual offerings and earn rewards for every devotee you introduce to Mantra Puja.

promo.commissionDesc: Earn a flat 10% commission on every single purchase made by the users you refer. Real-time logging on dispatch.
promo.unlimitedDesc: Share with as many friends, family members, or followers as you like. There are no caps or ceilings on your rewards.
promo.lifetimeDesc: Refer one or multiple devotees. Get a flat 10% commission on their first purchase and lifetime rewards whenever they buy again.

auth.title: Partner Onboarding
auth.desc: Enter your phone number to login or register and apply to the program.
auth.phoneHelp: We will send a one-time verification code to this number via WhatsApp.

active.title: You are an Active Partner!
active.desc: Your partner account is active. Share your referral link, scan barcode, and Mantra Puja logo with devotees across social media!

pending.title: Application Under Review
pending.desc: Thank you for applying! Your application has been registered and is pending administrator review.
pending.name: Name:
pending.footer: Once our administrator approves your account, your custom referral links and earnings dashboard will automatically unlock.

suspended.title: Account Suspended
suspended.desc: Your partner partnership account has been suspended by the store administrator. Please contact support.

enroll.title: Partner Profile details
enroll.desc: Enter your details to register and join the program.
enroll.termsCheck: I agree to the Terms and Conditions of the Mantra Puja Partner/Affiliate program.

instagram.title: Share on Instagram Stories
instagram.desc: Instagram does not support direct links or file transfers from web browsers. We have automatically uploaded your unified **Blessings Card** image to Cloudflare CDN and copied the share message containing your referral link and card preview link to your clipboard.
instagram.step1: Open your Instagram App and swipe right to create a new Story.
instagram.step2: Use the Link Sticker to add your copied referral link.
instagram.step3: Paste the full spiritual message and dynamic barcode link directly on your story and publish!
